title.en: At this time, a sixth-rank invincible person fr...

content.en:
Tianfeng Hai's headquarters is not in Juewu City, as for where it is, Ye Tian naturally can't find out, but Tianfeng Hai also has a branch in Juewu City, and there is still a lot of business.

Therefore, Ye Tian went directly to the Tianfeng Sea's Tianfeng Sea branch in the Absolute Martial City.

Tianfeng Sea Branch, Ye Tian came here and directly stated that he wanted to join Tianfeng Hai.

At this time, a sixth-rank invincible person from Tianfeng Sea met with Ye Tian.

"You want to join us in the Heavenly Wind Sea?"

Mo Shan, a sixth-rank invincible, looked at Ye Tiandao.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded slightly.

Mo Silent said: "Come with me, test what kind of flesh Crystal Robbery you have advanced to the Invincible realm!"

Ye Tian followed Mo Lin and came to a test area of the Tianfeng Sea Branch.

Soon, they came to a huge stone mirror.

Mo Lin pointed to this stone mirror and said: "This is a high-grade robbery weapon - the cave robbery mirror, which can spy on an invincible person who has survived several physical tribulations, of course, before the test, you need to pay 100 Origin Rules Tribulation Realm to prevent some invincible people from failing to meet the requirements, and deliberately come to the test, wasting our time, the test is completed, if you meet the requirements, 100 Origin Rule Robbery Crystals will be returned to you!"

Ye Tian didn't feel that there was anything wrong with this, so he directly took out a hundred Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals and handed them to Mo Lone.

Subsequently, the tests began.

Airplanes!!!

The Cave Tribulation Mirror released a ray of light that enveloped Ye Tian, and soon black light appeared.

A black light represents a catastrophe!

Five Ways!

Six ways!

Seven Ways!

When he saw the seven black lights, Mo Lin was a little surprised: "This invincible person has a good talent, an invincible person who has broken through the Seven Tribulations Realm in the flesh." "

As for the Eight Tribulation Realm, he didn't dare to think about it, because the Eight Tribulation Realm of the Flesh Body belonged to geniuses in the Tianlin Realm, and he had already been recruited by the Saint-level forces when the strongest was in the Flesh Tribulation Realm, and it was impossible to wait until the time of the invincible to join the Heavenly Wind Sea.

But then, an eighth black light emerged.

Eight Tribulations of the Flesh!

At this moment, Mo Lian's expression changed, and he was extremely shocked.

However, this is not the end of the story.

A ninth black light also appeared, and it was only then that the test ended.

"Nine ...... the flesh Nine Tribulation Realm!"

Mo Lone's pupils shrank sharply, extremely shocked.

He didn't know if he had seen the demons of the Nine Tribulations Realm of the Flesh Body, but all of them were existences that he looked up to, even in the Heavenly Wind Sea, there were not many geniuses in the Nine Tribulations Realm of the Flesh Body!

Then, he realized that Tianfeng Hai had picked up a treasure.

As soon as possible, he informed the high-level of the Tianfeng Sea Branch, lest this genius be snatched away by other forces.

At the second when Mo Lin notified, a figure appeared.

"I've seen Lord Ryuhe!"

Mo Lin saw the man in front of him and said respectfully.

Long He, the head of the Tianfeng Sea Branch of the Absolute Martial City, the third-class invincible realm, is extremely powerful.

"Mo Lone, is this the person?"

Long He said a little excitedly.

"Yes, Lord Longhe!" Mo Silent replied.

Long He stared at Ye Tian and said seriously, "Can you test it again?"

Ye Tian guessed that his talent was too good, which attracted the attention of the top management of Tianfeng Sea, which was a good thing.

So, Ye Tianying said: "Yes!"

Subsequently, Ye Tian tested it again, and nine black lights appeared one after another.

"Sure enough, he is an invincible person who has been promoted to the Nine Tribulations Realm of the Flesh!"

Long He said excitedly.

Immediately, he said directly: "Congratulations, you can directly become a member of Tianfeng Sea!"

"Don't you need to complete an introductory task?" Ye Tian asked suspiciously.

"No!" Ryuhe replied, "Those missions are for the average invincible, and for a genius like you, there is no need to complete those tasks at all. Moreover, many tasks are very time-consuming, and even a little dangerous, but there are too many invincible people who want to join Tianfeng Sea, if it is not so restricted, countless invincible people with no potential will join Tianfeng Sea, and Tianfeng Sea will have to spend resources to cultivate, which is not worth it at all. "

Ye Tian nodded, feeling very reasonable.

A Saint-level force like Tianfeng Sea didn't need those ordinary sixth-rank invincibles to increase their strength, so it didn't matter to them that there were more invincibles and fewer invincibles.

What Tianfeng Hai needs are those geniuses who can truly enhance Tianfenghai's strength and prestige, and even bring benefits to Tianfenghai, rather than blindly asking for resources from Tianfenghai.

"Come with me!"

Long He said.

Then, he took Ye Tian to the internal area of the Tianfeng Sea Branch.

Here, he went through the procedures for Ye Tian to join Tianfenghai, and made the badge of Tianfenghai members.

The members of Tianfeng Sea are divided into five levels, ordinary members, senior members, elite members, glory members, and supreme members.

Most of the members are ordinary members, a few are high-level members, and only those above the elite level belong to the high-level.

For example, Long River is one of the elite members.

And as soon as Ye Tianhai joins Tianfenghai, he is a senior member, which is also the preferential treatment of top geniuses.

Of course, Ye Tian's senior membership still needs to be verified, and it must wait for the headquarters to send someone over to investigate before it can be determined.

Soon, a few came from the headquarters to assess Ye Tian.

The content of the assessment is very simple, similar to the content of the test.

Soon after, Ye Tian's senior membership status was confirmed.

......

"Ye Tian, now you are officially a senior member of Tianfenghai, but you probably don't know much about Tianfenghai, let me tell you about Tianfenghai's situation. "

Long He gave a general explanation of the situation of Tianfeng Sea.

From the strength of Tianfeng Hai, the area occupied, the treatment and other issues, he made a detailed description one by one.

"Ye Tian, although you are a senior member as soon as you join Tianfeng Hai, if you want to be promoted in the future, you must complete one task after another, and obtain contribution points through these tasks, so as to be promoted step by step. "Dragon River Road.

Ye Tian has been listening carefully, and he naturally understands Tianfeng Sea more and more.

A few days later, a reward belonging to Ye Tian arrived, it was a reward that top geniuses had, maybe for those strong people, this reward was not of much value, but it was a reward that Ye Tian needed incomparably.

A medium-grade defensive robbery, a medium-grade knife robbery, a thirty-grade robbery blood, and a robbery order.

The Body Robbery Order is a token that can be exchanged for an invincible body robbery method from the Heavenly Wind Sea.

"Isn't the Invincible Body Raider something that you have since you broke through to the Invincible One, why is there still an Invincible Body Raiding Method?" Ye Tian was a little puzzled, so he asked Long He on the spot.

Long He replied: "Ye Tian, the invincible body after the invincible person breaks through is just an ordinary invincible body, no matter how powerful your previous body was, and how terrifying the condensed ancestral body was, but the essence of the power of the body you absorbed was not much different from the power of other invincibles, because your invincible body was not much different from the invincible body of other people, it was just slightly stronger." But the invincible body has a higher level of invincible body robbery that is different from the ordinary invincible body. For example, the Blood River Tribulation Body I cultivated, the physical body limit of the same level is three times that of ordinary people, maybe at the level of a sixth-rank invincible, three times is nothing, but what if it reaches a fifth-level invincible, a fourth-rank invincible, or even a third-class invincible?"

Long He didn't continue, but Ye Tian imagined it, the more advanced the invincible person who cultivated the invincible body, the higher the cultivation, the easier it was to crush the ordinary invincible.

is also a third-class invincible, Long He can definitely kill those invincible people who only have ordinary invincible robberies in seconds.

Therefore, for the invincible, the quality of the invincible robbery is extremely important.

At this time, Ye Tian was very glad that he had joined the Heavenly Wind Sea, otherwise he would really be reckless in his cultivation and promoted to the realm of fifth-rank invincible with an ordinary invincible body, I was afraid that he would be beaten by those fifth-rank invincible people of saint-level forces.
